# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to MD Reader! 🎉

Please read our [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for detailed information on how to contribute to this project.

## Quick Links

- [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Issue Templates](../.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/)
- [Pull Request Template](../.github/pull_request_template.md)

## Ways to Contribute

- 🐛 Report bugs
- 💡 Suggest new features
- 📝 Improve documentation
- 🔧 Submit pull requests

Thank you for making MD Reader better! 💪
